title: Ultra Hardcore Gamemode
description: Adds an easy-to-use 'Ultra Hardcore' gamemode button. For the tryharders.
body:
# Ultra Hardcore Gamemode (UHC)

[![Modrinth Badge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ultra-hardcore-gamemode) [![GitHub Badge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/cozy/available/github_vector.svg)](https://github.com/ferdinandkeller/ultra-hardcore-gamemode)

Ever wished the game had a 'Ultra Hardcore' gamemode button ?

Well now it does.


_What the new UI looks like:_
![Minecraft Game Mode selector.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4073f5315c401e89b8ead14fca50d39aba2d40c_0.webp)

## FAQ

_Can I remove the mod after the world is generated?_

Yes you can, adding/removing the mod has **absolutely no effect** on existing worlds.
The mod works by automatically setting the `naturalRegeneration` gamerule to false. No need to feedle with settings. It's just a QoL mod.

_The button doesn't translate to my locale_

Currently only a few languages are supported. If you want to add your language to the mix, you can either ping me to make it available to everyone, or just make a resource pack with a `selectWorld.gameMode.ultra_hardcore` language key.
